opportunities.title: [OSS] shamilahmdt/devtasks: 🟢 Good First Issue: Implement Inline Task Editing — Beginner Friendly
opportunities.description:
# 🟢 Good First Issue: Implement Inline Task Editing — Beginner Friendly

**Time:** ~15–30 minutes
**Difficulty:** Beginner / Intermediate
**Skill Level:** First-time contributors welcome

🟢 No advanced setup required! This feature introduces contributors to real-world React state management and interactive UI behavior.

---

## 🏷 Labels

`good first issue` · `help wanted` · `feature` · `react` · `ui-improvement` · `hacktoberfest`

**Tech Stack:** React, Tailwind CSS, localStorage
**Good For:** Beginners learning dynamic UI rendering and state updates

---
